en: Are you high again? Well done, Columbo.
You need to slow down, Fred. Don't be such a bore. I'm here, aren't I?
ko: 지루하게 굴지 마. 내가 여기 있잖아. 너는?

en: Are you? I don't care if you're shit-faced.
As long as you can sing. No, John. I don't want to play it.
No more for it. What's that supposed to mean? I'm tired of the bloody anthems.
ko: 그게 무슨 뜻이야? 지겨운 국가가 질렸어.

en: I want the energy in the clubs. The bodies. I want to make people move.
You mean disco? Why not? Do you mind pissing off? This is a band discussion.
Drum loops. Synthesizers. If you say so. It's not us.
Us? It's not Queen. Queen is whatever I say it is.
Well, you can play your own bloody drums, then.
ko: 그럼 네 드럼이나 치면 돼, 프레드.

en: Fred. OK. Let's see how good a boxer you really are.
ko: 좋아. 네가 진짜 복서인지 한번 보자. 로저. 진정해.

en: Roger, take it easy. Take it easy. Take it easy.
That's quite a cool riff, actually.
